items.title: Jade: A High-throughput Concurrent Copying Garbage Collector.
items.abstract: Garbage collection (GC) pauses are a notorious issue threatening the latency of applications. To mitigate this problem, state-of-the-art concurrent copying collectors allow GC threads to run simultaneously with application threads (mutators) in nearly all GC phases. However, the design of concurrent copying collectors does not always lead to low application latency. To this end, this work studies the behaviors of mainstream concurrent copying collectors in OpenJDK and mainly focuses on long application pauses under heavy workloads. By analyzing the design of those collectors, this work uncovers that lengthy pre-reclamation cycles (including GC phases before actual memory release), high GC frequency, and large metadata maintenance overhead are major factors for long pauses. Therefore, this work proposes Jade, a concurrent copying collector aiming to achieve both short pauses and high GC efficiency. Compared with existing collectors, Jade provides a group-wise collection mechanism to shorten pre-reclamation cycles while controlling GC frequency. It also embraces a generational heap layout and a single-phase algorithm to maximize young GC's throughput. The evaluation results on representative latency-critical applications show that Jade can reach sub-millisecond-level pauses even under heavy workloads and significantly improve applications' peak throughput compared with state-of-the-art concurrent collectors.
items.abstract_zh: 垃圾收集 (GC) 暂停是一个威胁应用程序延迟的臭名昭著的问题。为了缓解这个问题，最先进的并发复制收集器允许 GC 线程在几乎所有 GC 阶段与应用程序线程（变异器）同时运行。然而，并发复制收集器的设计并不总能带来低应用程序延迟。为此，本工作研究了 OpenJDK 中主流并发复制收集器的行为，主要关注重负载下的长时间应用程序暂停。通过分析这些收集器的设计，这项工作发现，较长的预回收周期（包括实际内存释放之前的 GC 阶段）、高 GC 频率和大量元数据维护开销是长时间暂停的主要因素。因此，本文提出了 Jade，一种并发复制收集器，旨在实现短暂停和高 GC 效率。与现有的收集器相比，Jade 提供了分组收集机制，可以缩短预回收周期，同时控制 GC 频率。它还采用分代堆布局和单阶段算法来最大限度地提高年轻 GC 的吞吐量。对代表性延迟关键应用程序的评估结果表明，即使在繁重的工作负载下，Jade 也可以达到亚毫秒级的暂停，并且与最先进的并发收集器相比，显着提高了应用程序的峰值吞吐量。

items.title: Core Graph: Exploiting Edge Centrality to Speedup the Evaluation of Iterative Graph Queries.
items.abstract: When evaluating an iterative graph query over a large graph, systems incur significant overheads due to repeated graph transfer across the memory hierarchy coupled with repeated (redundant) propagation of values over the edges in the graph. An approach for reducing these overheads combines the use of a small proxy graph and the large original graph in a two phase query evaluation. The first phase evaluates the query on the proxy graph incurring low overheads and producing mostly precise results. The second phase uses these mostly precise results to bootstrap query evaluation on the larger original graph producing fully precise results. The effectiveness of this approach depends upon the quality of the proxy graph. Prior methods find proxy graphs that are either large or produce highly imprecise results.
items.abstract_zh: 当评估大型图上的迭代图查询时，由于跨内存层次结构的重复图传输以及图边缘上值的重复（冗余）传播，系统会产生大量开销。减少这些开销的方法在两阶段查询评估中结合使用小型代理图和大型原始图。第一阶段评估代理图上的查询，产生较低的开销并产生大部分精确的结果。第二阶段使用这些最精确的结果来引导对较大原始图的查询评估，产生完全精确的结果。这种方法的有效性取决于代理图的质量。先前的方法发现代理图要么很大，要么产生非常不精确的结果。

items.title: Characterization and Reclamation of Frozen Garbage in Managed FaaS Workloads.
items.abstract: FaaS (function-as-a-service) is becoming a popular workload in cloud environments due to its virtues such as auto-scaling and pay-as-you-go. High-level languages like JavaScript and Java are commonly used in FaaS for programmability, but their managed runtimes complicate memory management in the cloud. This paper first observes the issue of frozen garbage, which is caused by freezing cached function instances where their threads have been paused but the unused memory (e.g., garbage) is not reclaimed due to the semantic gap between FaaS and the managed runtime. This paper presents the first characterization of the negative effects induced by frozen garbage with various functions, which uncovers that it can occupy more than half of FaaS instances' memory resources on average. To this end, this paper proposes Desiccant, a freeze-aware memory manager for managed workloads in FaaS, which reclaims idle memory resources consumed by frozen garbage from managed runtime instances and thus notably improves memory efficiency. The evaluation on various FaaS workloads shows that Desiccant can reduce FaaS functions' peak memory consumption by up to 6.72×. Such saved memory consumption allows caching more FaaS instances to reduce the frequency of cold boots (creating instances before function execution) and p99 latency by up to 4.49× and 37.5%, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: FaaS（功能即服务）由于其自动扩展和按需付费等优点，正在成为云环境中流行的工作负载。 JavaScript 和 Java 等高级语言通常在 FaaS 中用于实现可编程性，但它们的托管运行时使云中的内存管理变得复杂。本文首先观察了冻结垃圾的问题，这是由于冻结了缓存的函数实例而导致的，其中它们的线程已暂停，但由于 FaaS 和托管运行时之间的语义差距，未使用的内存（例如垃圾）没有被回收。本文首次描述了具有各种功能的冻结垃圾带来的负面影响，发现它平均可以占用 FaaS 实例一半以上的内存资源。为此，本文提出了 Desiccant，一种用于 FaaS 中托管工作负载的冻结感知内存管理器，它从托管运行时实例中回收冻结垃圾消耗的空闲内存资源，从而显着提高内存效率。对各种 FaaS 工作负载的评估表明，Desiccant 可以将 FaaS 功能的峰值内存消耗降低高达 6.72 倍。这样节省的内存消耗允许缓存更多 FaaS 实例，从而将冷启动频率（在函数执行之前创建实例）和 p99 延迟分别降低高达 4.49 倍和 37.5%。

items.title: MTM: Rethinking Memory Profiling and Migration for Multi-Tiered Large Memory.
items.abstract: Multi-terabyte large memory systems are often characterized by more than two memory tiers with different latency and bandwidth. Multi-tiered large memory systems call for rethinking of memory profiling and migration because of the unique problems unseen in the traditional memory systems with smaller capacity and fewer tiers. We develop MTM, an application-transparent Multi-Tiered Memory management framework, based on three principles: (1) connecting the control of profiling overhead with the profiling mechanism for high-quality profiling; (2) building a universal page migration policy on the complex multi-tiered memory for high performance; and (3) introducing huge page awareness. We evaluate MTM using common big-data applications with realistic working sets (hundreds of GB to 1 TB). MTM outperforms seven solutions by up to 42% (17% on average).
items.abstract_zh: 多 TB 大型内存系统通常具有两个以上具有不同延迟和带宽的内存层。多层大内存系统需要重新考虑内存分析和迁移，因为传统内存系统中容量较小、层数较少的独特问题是看不到的。我们开发了MTM，一个应用程序透明的多层内存管理框架，基于三个原则：（1）将分析开销的控制与高质量分析的分析机制联系起来； (2)在复杂的多层内存上构建通用的页面迁移策略以实现高性能； (3)引入大页面感知。我们使用具有实际工作集（数百 GB 到 1 TB）的常见大数据应用程序来评估 MTM。 MTM 的性能比 7 种解决方案高出 42%（平均 17%）。

items.title: Blox: A Modular Toolkit for Deep Learning Schedulers.
items.abstract: Deep Learning (DL) workloads have rapidly increased in popularity in enterprise clusters and several new cluster schedulers have been proposed in recent years to support these workloads. With rapidly evolving DL workloads, it is challenging to quickly prototype and compare scheduling policies across workloads. Further, as prior systems target different aspects of scheduling (resource allocation, placement, elasticity etc.), it is also challenging to combine these techniques and understand the overall benefits. To address these challenges we propose Blox, a modular toolkit which allows developers to compose individual components and realize diverse scheduling frameworks. We identify a set of core abstractions for DL scheduling, implement several existing schedulers using these abstractions, and verify the fidelity of these implementations by reproducing results from prior research. We also highlight how we can evaluate and compare existing schedulers in new settings: different workload traces, higher cluster load, change in DNN workloads and deployment characteristics. Finally, we showcase Blox's extensibility by composing policies from different schedulers, and implementing novel policies with minimal code changes. Blox is available at https://github.com/msr-fiddle/blox.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 工作负载在企业集群中迅速普及，近年来提出了几种新的集群调度程序来支持这些工作负载。随着深度学习工作负载的快速发展，快速构建原型并比较跨工作负载的调度策略具有挑战性。此外，由于现有系统针对调度的不同方面（资源分配、放置、弹性等），因此将这些技术结合起来并了解总体优势也具有挑战性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 Blox，这是一个模块化工具包，允许开发人员组合单独的组件并实现不同的调度框架。我们确定了深度学习调度的一组核心抽象，使用这些抽象实现了几个现有的调度器，并通过重现先前研究的结果来验证这些实现的保真度。我们还重点介绍了如何在新设置中评估和比较现有调度程序：不同的工作负载跟踪、更高的集群负载、DNN 工作负载和部署特征的变化。最后，我们通过组合来自不同调度程序的策略并以最少的代码更改实现新颖的策略来展示 Blox 的可扩展性。 Blox 可从 https://github.com/msr-fiddle/blox 获取。

items.title: Unison: A Parallel-Efficient and User-Transparent Network Simulation Kernel.
items.abstract: Discrete-event simulation (DES) is a prevalent tool for evaluating network designs. Although DES offers full fidelity and generality, its slow performance limits its application. To speed up DES, many network simulators employ parallel discrete-event simulation (PDES). However, adapting existing network simulation models to PDES requires complex reconfigurations and often yields limited performance improvement. In this paper, we address this gap by proposing a parallel-efficient and user-transparent network simulation kernel, Unison, that adopts fine-grained partition and load-adaptive scheduling optimized for network scenarios. We prototype Unison based on ns-3. Existing network simulation models of ns-3 can be seamlessly transitioned to Unison. Testbed experiments on commodity servers demonstrate that Unison can achieve a 40× speedup over DES using 24 CPU cores, and a 10× speedup compared with existing PDES algorithms under the same CPU cores.
items.abstract_zh: 离散事件仿真 (DES) 是评估网络设计的常用工具。尽管 DES 提供了完全的保真度和通用性，但其缓慢的性能限制了其应用。为了加速 DES，许多网络模拟器采用并行离散事件模拟 (PDES)。然而，使现有网络仿真模型适应 PDES 需要复杂的重新配置，并且通常产生有限的性能改进。在本文中，我们通过提出一种并行高效且用户透明的网络模拟内核 Unison 来解决这一差距，该内核采用针对网络场景优化的细粒度分区和负载自适应调度。我们基于 ns-3 制作了 Unison 原型。 ns-3现有的网络仿真模型可以无缝过渡到Unison。在商用服务器上的测试床实验表明，Unison 可以比使用 24 个 CPU 内核的 D​​ES 实现 40 倍的加速，与相同 CPU 内核下的现有 PDES 算法相比，可以实现 10 倍的加速。

items.title: Contigra: Graph Mining with Containment Constraints.
items.abstract: While graph mining systems employ efficient task-parallel strategies to quickly explore subgraphs of interest (or matches), they remain oblivious to containment constraints like maximality and minimality, resulting in expensive constraint checking on every explored match as well as redundant explorations that limit their scalability.
items.abstract_zh: 虽然图挖掘系统采用高效的任务并行策略来快速探索感兴趣的子图（或匹配），但它们仍然忽视最大值和最小值等包含约束，从而导致对每个探索的匹配进行昂贵的约束检查以及限制其可扩展性的冗余探索。

items.title: ZKML: An Optimizing System for ML Inference in Zero-Knowledge Proofs.
items.abstract: Machine learning (ML) is increasingly used behind closed systems and APIs to make important decisions. For example, social media uses ML-based recommendation algorithms to decide what to show users, and millions of people pay to use ChatGPT for information every day. Because ML is deployed behind these closed systems, there are increasing calls for transparency, such as releasing model weights. However, these service providers have legitimate reasons not to release this information, including for privacy and trade secrets. To bridge this gap, recent work has proposed using zero-knowledge proofs (specifically a form called ZK-SNARKs) for certifying computation with private models but has only been applied to unrealistically small models.
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 越来越多地用于封闭系统和 API 来做出重要决策。例如，社交媒体使用基于机器学习的推荐算法来决定向用户展示什么内容，每天有数百万人付费使用 ChatGPT 获取信息。由于机器学习部署在这些封闭系统后面，因此对透明度的呼声越来越高，例如发布模型权重。然而，这些服务提供商有正当理由不发布这些信息，包括出于隐私和商业秘密的考虑。为了弥补这一差距，最近的工作提出使用零知识证明（特别是一种称为 ZK-SNARK 的形式）来验证私有模型的计算，但仅应用于不切实际的小模型。

items.title: Automatic Root Cause Analysis via Large Language Models for Cloud Incidents.
items.abstract: Ensuring the reliability and availability of cloud services necessitates efficient root cause analysis (RCA) for cloud incidents. Traditional RCA methods, which rely on manual investigations of data sources such as logs and traces, are often laborious, error-prone, and challenging for on-call engineers. In this paper, we introduce RCACopilot, an innovative on-call system empowered by the large language model for automating RCA of cloud incidents. RCACopilot matches incoming incidents to corresponding incident handlers based on their alert types, aggregates the critical runtime diagnostic information, predicts the incident's root cause category, and provides an explanatory narrative. We evaluate RCACopilot using a real-world dataset consisting of a year's worth of incidents from Microsoft. Our evaluation demonstrates that RCACopilot achieves RCA accuracy up to 0.766. Furthermore, the diagnostic information collection component of RCACopilot has been successfully in use at Microsoft for over four years.
items.abstract_zh: 确保云服务的可靠性和可用性需要对云事件进行有效的根本原因分析 (RCA)。传统的 RCA 方法依赖于对日志和跟踪等数据源进行手动调查，对于待命工程师来说通常很费力、容易出错且具有挑战性。在本文中，我们介绍了 RCACopilot，这是一种创新的待命系统，由大型语言模型支持，用于自动化云事件 RCA。 RCACopilot 根据警报类型将传入事件与相应的事件处理程序进行匹配，聚合关键运行时诊断信息，预测事件的根本原因类别，并提供解释性叙述。我们使用由 Microsoft 一年的事件组成的真实数据集来评估 RCACopilot。我们的评估表明 RCACopilot 的 RCA 准确度高达 0.766。此外，RCACopilot 的诊断信息收集组件已在 Microsoft 成功使用了四年多。

items.title: DeTA: Minimizing Data Leaks in Federated Learning via Decentralized and Trustworthy Aggregation.
items.abstract: Federated learning (FL) relies on a central authority to oversee and aggregate model updates contributed by multiple participating parties in the training process. This centralization of sensitive model updates naturally raises concerns about the trustworthiness of the central aggregation server, as well as the potential risks associated with server failures or breaches, which could result in loss and leaks of model updates. Moreover, recent attacks have demonstrated that, by obtaining the leaked model updates, malicious actors can even reconstruct substantial amounts of private data belonging to training participants. This underscores the critical necessity to rethink the existing FL system architecture to mitigate emerging attacks in the evolving threat landscape. One straightforward approach is to fortify the central aggregator with confidential computing (CC), which offers hardware-assisted protection for runtime computation and can be remotely verified for execution integrity. However, a growing number of security vulnerabilities have surfaced in tandem with the adoption of CC, indicating that depending solely on this singular defense may not provide the requisite resilience to thwart data leaks.
items.abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 依靠中央机构来监督和汇总培训过程中多个参与方贡献的模型更新。这种敏感模型更新的集中化自然会引发人们对中央聚合服务器的可信度以及与服务器故障或违规相关的潜在风险的担忧，这可能会导致模型更新的丢失和泄漏。此外，最近的攻击表明，通过获取泄露的模型更新，恶意行为者甚至可以重建属于训练参与者的大量私人数据。这强调了重新思考现有 FL 系统架构的迫切必要性，以减轻不断变化的威胁环境中不断出现的攻击。一种简单的方法是通过机密计算（CC）来强化中央聚合器，它为运行时计算提供硬件辅助保护，并且可以远程验证执行完整性。然而，随着 CC 的采用，越来越多的安全漏洞浮出水面，这表明仅仅依靠这种单一的防御可能无法提供阻止数据泄漏所需的弹性。

items.title: Totoro: A Scalable Federated Learning Engine for the Edge.
items.abstract: Federated Learning (FL) is an emerging distributed machine learning (ML) technique that enables in-situ model training and inference on decentralized edge devices. We propose Totoro, a novel scalable FL engine, that enables massive FL applications to run simultaneously on edge networks. The key insight is to explore a distributed hash table (DHT)-based peer-to-peer (P2P) model to re-architect the centralized FL system design into a fully decentralized one. In contrast to previous studies where many FL applications shared one centralized parameter server, Totoro assigns a dedicated parameter server to each individual application. Any edge node can act as any application's coordinator, aggregator, client selector, worker (participant device), or any combination of the above, thereby radically improving scalability and adaptivity. Totoro introduces three innovations to realize its design: a locality-aware P2P multi-ring structure, a publish/subscribe-based forest abstraction, and a bandit-based exploitation-exploration path planning model. Real-world experiments on 500 Amazon EC2 servers show that Totoro scales gracefully with the number of FL applications and N edge nodes, speeds up the total training time by 1.2 × -14.0×, achieves O (logN) hops for model dissemination and gradient aggregation with millions of nodes, and efficiently adapts to the practical edge networks and churns.
items.abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 是一种新兴的分布式机器学习 (ML) 技术，可在分散的边缘设备上进行原位模型训练和推理。我们提出了 Totoro，一种新颖的可扩展 FL 引擎，它使大量 FL 应用程序能够在边缘网络上同时运行。关键的见解是探索一种基于分布式哈希表 (DHT) 的点对点 (P2P) 模型，将集中式 FL 系统设计重新构建为完全去中心化的系统。与之前的研究中许多 FL 应用程序共享一个集中式参数服务器不同，Totoro 为每个单独的应用程序分配一个专用的参数服务器。任何边缘节点都可以充当任何应用程序的协调器、聚合器、客户端选择器、工作器（参与者设备）或上述的任意组合，从而从根本上提高可扩展性和适应性。 Totoro引入了三项创新来实现其设计：局部感知的P2P多环结构、基于发布/订阅的森林抽象以及基于强盗的利用-探索路径规划模型。在 500 台 Amazon EC2 服务器上进行的实际实验表明，Totoro 可以随着 FL 应用程序和 N 个边缘节点的数量进行优雅的扩展，将总训练时间加快 1.2 × -14.0 ×，实现数百万节点的模型传播和梯度聚合 O (logN) 跳，并有效地适应实际的边缘网络和扰动。

items.title: Atlas: Hybrid Cloud Migration Advisor for Interactive Microservices.
items.abstract: Hybrid cloud provides an attractive solution to microservices for better resource elasticity. A subset of application components can be offloaded from the on-premises cluster to the cloud, where they can readily access additional resources. However, the selection of this subset is challenging because of the large number of possible combinations. A poor choice degrades the application performance, disrupts the critical services, and increases the cost to the extent of making the use of hybrid cloud unviable. This paper presents Atlas, a hybrid cloud migration advisor. Atlas uses a data-driven approach to learn how each user-facing API utilizes different components and their network footprints to drive the migration decision. It learns to accelerate the discovery of high-quality migration plans from millions and offers recommendations with customizable trade-offs among three quality indicators: end-to-end latency of user-facing APIs representing application performance, service availability, and cloud hosting costs. Atlas continuously monitors the application even after the migration for proactive recommendations. Our evaluation shows that Atlas can achieve 21% better API performance (latency) and 11% cheaper cost with less service disruption than widely used solutions.
items.abstract_zh: 混合云为微服务提供了一个有吸引力的解决方案，以实现更好的资源弹性。可以将应用程序组件的子集从本地集群卸载到云，以便它们可以轻松访问其他资源。然而，由于可能的组合数量众多，因此该子集的选择具有挑战性。糟糕的选择会降低应用程序性能，破坏关键服务，并增加成本，甚至使混合云的使用变得不可行。本文介绍了 Atlas，一种混合​​云迁移顾问。 Atlas 使用数据驱动的方法来了解每个面向用户的 API 如何利用不同的组件及其网络足迹来推动迁移决策。它学习如何加速发现数百万人的高质量迁移计划，并提供在三个质量指标之间进行可定制权衡的建议：代表应用程序性能、服务可用性和云托管成本的面向用户的 API 的端到端延迟。即使在迁移后，Atlas 也会持续监控应用程序以获取主动建议。我们的评估表明，与广泛使用的解决方案相比，Atlas 的 API 性能（延迟）提高了 21%，成本降低了 11%，服务中断也更少。

items.title: Validating Database System Isolation Level Implementations with Version Certificate Recovery.
items.abstract: Transactions are a key feature of database systems and isolation levels specify the behavior of concurrently executing transactions. Ensuring their correct behavior is crucial. Recently, many isolation anomalies have been found in production database systems. Checkers can be used to validate that a particular execution conforms to a desired isolation level. However, state-of-the-art checkers cannot handle predicate operations, which are both common in real-world workloads and essential for distinguishing between the repeatable read and serializable isolation levels. In this work, we address this issue by proposing an efficient white-box checker, Emme. Our key idea is to use information that is easily provided by database systems to efficiently check the isolation level of a given transaction history. We present version certificate recovery, a method of recovering the version order and each operation's version from the database system under test. For efficiency, we also propose the concept of an expected serialization order, which obviates the need to define and recover a version certificate for many serializable concurrency control protocols. We have implemented version certificate recovery for three widely used database systems---PostgreSQL, CockroachDB, and TiDB. We demonstrate that Emme is 1.2-3.6× faster than Elle, a state-of-the-art checker. Using the expected serialization order, we obtain a further speedup of 34-430× compared to Emme when checking histories containing predicate operations. We show that our approach can identify invalid histories that cannot be detected by Elle and also show that it can find realistic bugs purposely introduced by an engineer.
items.abstract_zh: 事务是数据库系统的一个关键功能，隔离级别指定并发执行事务的行为。确保他们的正确行为至关重要。最近，在生产数据库系统中发现了许多隔离异常。检查器可用于验证特定执行是否符合所需的隔离级别。然而，最先进的检查器无法处理谓词操作，这在现实世界的工作负载中很常见，并且对于区分可重复读取和可序列化隔离级别至关重要。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一种高效的白盒检查器 Emme 来解决这个问题。我们的关键思想是使用数据库系统轻松提供的信息来有效地检查给定事务历史记录的隔离级别。我们提出版本证书恢复，一种从被测数据库系统恢复版本顺序和每个操作版本的方法。为了提高效率，我们还提出了预期序列化顺序的概念，这消除了为许多可序列化并发控制协议定义和恢复版本证书的需要。我们为 PostgreSQL、CockroachDB、TiDB 三种广泛使用的数据库系统实现了版本证书恢复。我们证明 Emme 比最先进的检查器 Elle 快 1.2-3.6 倍。使用预期的序列化顺序，在检查包含谓词操作的历史记录时，与 Emme 相比，我们获得了 34-430 倍的进一步加速。我们表明，我们的方法可以识别 Elle 无法检测到的无效历史记录，并且还表明它可以找到工程师故意引入的实际错误。

items.title: Polynima: Practical Hybrid Recompilation for Multithreaded Binaries.
items.abstract: The maintenance of software distributed in its binary form can become challenging over time, due to the lack of vendor support or obsolete build environments. This can be costly when dealing with critical security vulnerabilities that are difficult to fix on a binary level. Moreover, advances in compiler technologies of the past decades remain unavailable to the users of such legacy binaries for performing optimizations and transformations. Binary recompilers aim to bridge this divide by "lifting" binary executables to compiler-level intermediate representations (IR) and "lowering" them back again. But, current recompilers fail on that promise as they rely on unsound heuristics or impose high tracing overheads. Crucially, no existing recompiler addresses the specific challenges imposed by multithreaded programs that are ubiquitous in the modern software space.
items.abstract_zh: 随着时间的推移，由于缺乏供应商支持或过时的构建环境，以二进制形式分发的软件的维护可能会变得具有挑战性。当处理难以在二进制级别修复的关键安全漏洞时，这可能代价高昂。此外，过去几十年来编译器技术的进步仍然无法让此类遗留二进制文件的用户执行优化和转换。二进制重新编译器旨在通过将二进制可执行文件“提升”为编译器级中间表示（IR）并再次将其“降低”回来来弥合这一鸿沟。但是，当前的重新编译器未能兑现这一承诺，因为它们依赖于不合理的启发式方法或施加高额跟踪开销。至关重要的是，现有的重新编译器还没有能够解决现代软件领域普遍存在的多线程程序所带来的具体挑战。

items.title: Dashing and Star: Byzantine Fault Tolerance with Weak Certificates.
items.abstract: State-of-the-art Byzantine fault-tolerant (BFT) protocols assuming partial synchrony such as SBFT and HotStuff use regular certificates obtained from 2f + 1 (partial) signatures. We show that one can use weak certificates obtained from only f + 1 signatures to assist in designing more robust and more efficient BFT protocols. We design and implement two BFT systems: Dashing (a family of two HotStuff-style BFT protocols) and Star (a parallel BFT framework).
items.abstract_zh: 最先进的拜占庭容错 (BFT) 协议假设部分同步，例如 SBFT 和 HotStuff，使用从 2f + 1（部分）签名获得的常规证书。我们证明，可以使用仅从 f + 1 个签名获得的弱证书来帮助设计更稳健、更高效的 BFT 协议。我们设计并实现了两个 BFT 系统：Dashing（两个 HotStuff 风格的 BFT 协议系列）和 Star（一个并行 BFT 框架）。

items.title: FLOWS: Balanced MRC Profiling for Heterogeneous Object-Size Cache.
items.abstract: While Miss Ratio Curve (MRC) profiling methods based on spatial sampling are effective in modeling cache behaviors, previous MRC studies lack in-depth analysis of profiling errors and primarily target homogeneous object-size scenarios. This has caused imbalanced errors of existing MRC approaches when employed in heterogeneous object-size caches. For instance, in CDN traces, the error of the Byte Miss Ratio Curve (BMRC) could be two orders of magnitude larger than that of the Object Miss Ratio Curve (OMRC).
items.abstract_zh: 虽然基于空间采样的未命中率曲线 (MRC) 分析方法可以有效地对缓存行为进行建模，但之前的 MRC 研究缺乏对分析错误的深入分析，并且主要针对同质对象大小场景。当现有 MRC 方法应用于异构对象大小缓存时，这会导致不平衡错误。例如，在 CDN 跟踪中，字节丢失率曲线 (BMRC) 的误差可能比对象丢失率曲线 (OMRC) 的误差大两个数量级。

items.title: Just-In-Time Checkpointing: Low Cost Error Recovery from Deep Learning Training Failures.
items.abstract: Deep Learning training jobs process large amounts of training data using many GPU devices, often running for weeks or months. When hardware or software failures happen, these jobs need to restart, losing the memory state for the Deep Neural Network (DNN) model trained so far, unless checkpointing mechanisms are used to save training state periodically. However, for large models, periodic checkpointing incurs significant steady state overhead, and during recovery, a large number of GPUs need to redo work since the last checkpoint. This is especially problematic when failures are frequent for large DNN (such as Large Language Model) training jobs using many GPUs. In this paper, we present a novel approach of just-in-time checkpointing when failures happen, which enables recovery from failures with just a single minibatch iteration of work replayed by all GPUs. This reduces the cost of error recovery from several minutes to a few seconds per GPU, with nearly zero steady state overhead. This also avoids the guesswork of choosing a checkpointing frequency since failure rates usually have high variance. We discuss how just-in-time checkpointing can be enabled in training code, as well as design of key mechanisms for transparent just-in-time checkpointing without user code change. We analyze the wasted GPU work of just-in-time checkpointing and show that it is less than periodic checkpointing for large numbers of GPUs. We present results from our implementation in modern AI cluster infrastructure.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习训练作业使用许多 GPU 设备处理大量训练数据，通常运行数周或数月。当发生硬件或软件故障时，这些作业需要重新启动，从而丢失迄今为止训练的深度神经网络（DNN）模型的内存状态，除非使用检查点机制定期保存训练状态。然而，对于大型模型，定期检查点会产生显着的稳态开销，并且在恢复期间，大量 GPU 需要重做自上一个检查点以来的工作。当使用许多 GPU 的大型 DNN（例如大型语言模型）训练作业频繁失败时，这尤其成问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种在发生故障时实时设置检查点的新颖方法，只需由所有 GPU 重放的单个小批量工作迭代即可从故障中恢复。这将每个 GPU 的错误恢复成本从几分钟减少到几秒钟，并且稳态开销几乎为零。这也避免了选择检查点频率的猜测，因为失败率通常具有很高的方差。我们讨论如何在训练代码中启用即时检查点，以及在不更改用户代码的情况下实现透明即时检查点的关键机制的设计。我们分析了即时检查点所浪费的 GPU 工作，并表明它比大量 GPU 的定期检查点要少。我们展示了在现代人工智能集群基础设施中实施的结果。

items.title: Optimus: Warming Serverless ML Inference via Inter-Function Model Transformation.
items.abstract: Serverless ML inference is an emerging cloud computing paradigm for low-cost, easy-to-manage inference services. In serverless ML inference, each call is executed in a container; however, the cold start of containers results in long inference delays. Unfortunately, most existing works do not work well because they still need to load models into containers from scratch, which is the bottleneck based on our observations. Therefore, this paper proposes a low-latency serverless ML inference system called Optimus via a new container management scheme. Our key insight is that the loading of a new model can be significantly accelerated when using an existing model with a similar structure in a warm but idle container. We thus develop a novel idea of inter-function model transformation for serverless ML inference, which delves into models within containers at a finer granularity of operations, designs a set of in-container meta-operators for both CNN and transformer model transformation, and develops an efficient scheduling algorithm with linear complexity for a low-cost transformation strategy. Our evaluations on thousands of models show that Optimus reduces inference latency by 24.00% ~ 47.56% in both simulated and real-world workloads compared to state-of-the-art work.
items.abstract_zh: 无服务器机器学习推理是一种新兴的云计算范例，用于低成本、易于管理的推理服务。在无服务器机器学习推理中，每个调用都在容器中执行；然而，容器的冷启动会导致较长的推理延迟。不幸的是，大多数现有工作效果不佳，因为它们仍然需要从头开始将模型加载到容器中，根据我们的观察，这是瓶颈。因此，本文通过一种新的容器管理方案提出了一种称为 Optimus 的低延迟无服务器机器学习推理系统。我们的主要见解是，当在温暖但空闲的容器中使用具有类似结构的现有模型时，可以显着加速新模型的加载。因此，我们开发了一种用于无服务器机器学习推理的功能间模型转换的新颖想法，该想法以更细的操作粒度深入研究容器内的模型，为 CNN 和 Transformer 模型转换设计一组容器内元运算符，并为低成本转换策略开发具有线性复杂度的高效调度算法。我们对数千个模型的评估表明，与最先进的工作相比，Optimus 在模拟和现实工作负载中将推理延迟降低了 24.00% ~ 47.56%。

items.title: CDMPP: A Device-Model Agnostic Framework for Latency Prediction of Tensor Programs.
items.abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have shown excellent performance in a wide range of machine learning applications. Knowing the latency of running a DNN model or tensor program on a specific device is useful in various tasks, such as DNN graph- or tensor-level optimization and device selection. Considering the large space of DNN models and devices that impedes direct profiling of all combinations, recent efforts focus on building a predictor to model the performance of DNN models on different devices. However, none of the existing attempts have achieved a cost model that can accurately predict the performance of various tensor programs while supporting both training and inference accelerators. We propose CDMPP, an efficient tensor program latency prediction framework for both cross-model and cross-device prediction. We design an informative but efficient representation of tensor programs, called compact ASTs, and a pre-order-based positional encoding method, to capture the internal structure of tensor programs. We develop a domain-adaption-inspired method to learn domain-invariant representations and devise a KMeans-based sampling algorithm, for the predictor to learn from different domains (i.e., different DNN operators and devices). Our extensive experiments on a diverse range of DNN models and devices demonstrate that CDMPP significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines with 14.03% and 10.85% prediction error for cross-model and cross-device prediction, respectively, and one order of magnitude higher training efficiency. The implementation and the expanded dataset are available at https://github.com/joapolarbear/cdmpp.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）在广泛的机器学习应用中表现出了出色的性能。了解在特定设备上运行 DNN 模型或张量程序的延迟对于各种任务非常有用，例如 DNN 图级或张量级优化和设备选择。考虑到 DNN 模型和设备的庞大空间阻碍了对所有组合的直接分析，最近的工作重点是构建一个预测器来对 DNN 模型在不同设备上的性能进行建模。然而，现有的尝试都没有实现能够准确预测各种张量程序的性能，同时支持训练和推理加速器的成本模型。我们提出了 CDMPP，一种用于跨模型和跨设备预测的高效张量程序延迟预测框架。我们设计了一种信息丰富但高效的张量程序表示（称为紧凑 AST），以及基于预序的位置编码方法，以捕获张量程序的内部结构。我们开发了一种受域适应启发的方法来学习域不变表示，并设计了一种基于 KMeans 的采样算法，以便预测器从不同的域（即不同的 DNN 运算符和设备）中学习。我们对各种 DNN 模型和设备进行的广泛实验表明，CDMPP 显着优于最先进的基线，跨模型和跨设备预测的预测误差分别为 14.03% 和 10.85%，训练效率提高了一个数量级。实现和扩展数据集可在 https://github.com/joapolarbear/cdmpp 获取。

items.title: Accelerating Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning With GeniBatch.
items.abstract: Cross-silo privacy-preserving machine learning (PPML) adopt; Partial Homomorphic Encryption (PHE) for secure data combination and high-quality model training across multiple organizations (e.g., medical and financial). However, PHE introduces significant computation and communication overheads due to data inflation. Batch optimization is an encouraging direction to mitigate the problem by compressing multiple data into a single ciphertext. While promising, it is impractical for a large number of cross-silo PPML applications due to the limited vector operations support and severe data corruption.
items.abstract_zh: 采用跨孤岛隐私保护机器学习（PPML）；部分同态加密 (PHE)，用于跨多个组织（例如医疗和金融）的安全数据组合和高质量模型训练。然而，由于数据膨胀，PHE 引入了大量的计算和通信开销。批量优化是通过将多个数据压缩为单个密文来缓解该问题的一个令人鼓舞的方向。虽然很有希望，但由于有限的向量操作支持和严重的数据损坏，对于大量跨孤岛 PPML 应用程序来说是不切实际的。

items.title: WiseGraph: Optimizing GNN with Joint Workload Partition of Graph and Operations.
items.abstract: Graph Neural Network (GNN) has emerged as an important workload for learning on graphs. With the size of graph data and the complexity of GNN model architectures increasing, developing an efficient GNN system grows more important. As GNN has heavy neural computation workloads on a large graph, it is crucial to partition the entire workload into smaller parts for parallel execution and optimization. However, existing approaches separately partition graph data and GNN operations, resulting in inefficiency and large data movement overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）已成为图学习的重要工作负载。随着图数据规模的增大和 GNN 模型架构复杂性的增加，开发高效的 GNN 系统变得更加重要。由于 GNN 在大图上具有繁重的神经计算工作负载，因此将整个工作负载划分为更小的部分以进行并行执行和优化至关重要。然而，现有方法将图数据和 GNN 操作分开划分，导致效率低下且数据移动开销较大。

items.title: Dordis: Efficient Federated Learning with Dropout-Resilient Differential Privacy.
items.abstract: Federated learning (FL) is increasingly deployed among multiple clients to train a shared model over decentralized data. To address privacy concerns, FL systems need to safeguard the clients' data from disclosure during training and control data leakage through trained models when exposed to untrusted domains. Distributed differential privacy (DP) offers an appealing solution in this regard as it achieves a balanced tradeoff between privacy and utility without a trusted server. However, existing distributed DP mechanisms are impractical in the presence of client dropout, resulting in poor privacy guarantees or degraded training accuracy. In addition, these mechanisms suffer from severe efficiency issues.
items.abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 越来越多地部署在多个客户端之间，以在分散的数据上训练共享模型。为了解决隐私问题，FL 系统需要保护客户的数据在训练期间不被泄露，并在暴露于不受信任的域时通过经过训练的模型控制数据泄漏。分布式差分隐私（DP）在这方面提供了一个有吸引力的解决方案，因为它无需可信服务器即可实现隐私和实用性之间的平衡权衡。然而，现有的分布式DP机制在存在客户端丢失的情况下是不切实际的，导致隐私保证较差或训练精度下降。此外，这些机制还存在严重的效率问题。

items.title: DynaPipe: Optimizing Multi-task Training through Dynamic Pipelines.
items.abstract: Multi-task model training has been adopted to enable a single deep neural network model (often a large language model) to handle multiple tasks (e.g., question answering and text summarization). Multi-task training commonly receives input sequences of highly different lengths due to the diverse contexts of different tasks. Padding (to the same sequence length) or packing (short examples into long sequences of the same length) is usually adopted to prepare input samples for model training, which is nonetheless not space or computation efficient. This paper proposes a dynamic micro-batching approach to tackle sequence length variation and enable efficient multi-task model training. We advocate pipelineparallel training of the large model with variable-length micro-batches, each of which potentially comprises a different number of samples. We optimize micro-batch construction using a dynamic programming-based approach, and handle micro-batch execution time variation through dynamic pipeline and communication scheduling, enabling highly efficient pipeline training. Extensive evaluation on the FLANv2 dataset demonstrates up to 4.39x higher training throughput when training T5, and 3.25x when training GPT, as compared with packing-based baselines. DynaPipe's source code is publicly available at https://github.com/awslabs/optimizing-multitask-training-through-dynamic-pipelines.
items.abstract_zh: 采用多任务模型训练，使单个深度神经网络模型（通常是大型语言模型）能够处理多个任务（例如，问答和文本摘要）。由于不同任务的上下文不同，多任务训练通常会接收长度差异很大的输入序列。通常采用填充（到相同的序列长度）或打包（将短示例放入相同长度的长序列）来准备用于模型训练的输入样本，但这在空间或计算效率上不高。本文提出了一种动态微批处理方法来解决序列长度变化并实现高效的多任务模型训练。我们提倡使用可变长度微批次对大型模型进行管道并行训练，每个微批次可能包含不同数量的样本。我们使用基于动态编程的方法优化微批量构建，并通过动态管道和通信调度处理微批量执行时间变化，从而实现高效的管道训练。对 FLANv2 数据集的广泛评估表明，与基于打包的基线相比，训练 T5 时的训练吞吐量提高了 4.39 倍，训练 GPT 时的训练吞吐量提高了 3.25 倍。 DynaPipe 的源代码可在 https://github.com/awslabs/optimizing-multitask-training-through-dynamic-pipelines 上公开获取。

items.title: Concealing Compression-accelerated I/O for HPC Applications through In Situ Task Scheduling.
items.abstract: Lossy compression and asynchronous I/O are two of the most effective solutions for reducing storage overhead and enhancing I/O performance in large-scale high-performance computing (HPC) applications. However, current approaches have limitations that prevent them from fully leveraging lossy compression, and they may also result in task collisions, which restrict the overall performance of HPC applications. To address these issues, we propose an optimization approach for the task scheduling problem that encompasses computation, compression, and I/O. Our algorithm adaptively selects the optimal compression and I/O queue to minimize the performance degradation of the computation. We also introduce an intra-node I/O workload balancing mechanism that evenly distributes the workload across different processes. Additionally, we design a framework that incorporates fine-grained compression, a compressed data buffer, and a shared Huffman tree to fully benefit from our proposed task scheduling. Experimental results with up to 16 nodes and 64 GPUs from ORNL Summit, as well as real-world HPC applications, demonstrate that our solution reduces I/O overhead by up to 3.8× and 2.6× compared to non-compression and asynchronous I/O solutions, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 有损压缩和异步 I/O 是在大规模高性能计算 (HPC) 应用程序中减少存储开销和增强 I/O 性能的两种最有效的解决方案。然而，当前的方法存在局限性，无法充分利用有损压缩，并且还可能导致任务冲突，从而限制 HPC 应用程序的整体性能。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种针对任务调度问题的优化方法，其中包括计算、压缩和 I/O。我们的算法自适应地选择最佳压缩和 I/O 队列，以最大限度地减少计算性能下降。我们还引入了节点内 I/O 工作负载平衡机制，可以在不同进程之间均匀分配工作负载。此外，我们设计了一个框架，其中包含细粒度压缩、压缩数据缓冲区和共享霍夫曼树，以充分受益于我们提出的任务调度。 ORNL Summit 的多达 16 个节点和 64 个 GPU 的实验结果以及实际的 HPC 应用程序表明，与非压缩和异步 I/O 解决方案相比，我们的解决方案分别将 I/O 开销减少了 3.8 倍和 2.6 倍。

items.title: FLOAT: Federated Learning Optimizations with Automated Tuning.
items.abstract: Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a powerful approach that enables collaborative distributed model training without the need for data sharing. However, FL grapples with inherent heterogeneity challenges leading to issues such as stragglers, dropouts, and performance variations. Selection of clients to run an FL instance is crucial, but existing strategies introduce biases and participation issues and do not consider resource efficiency. Communication and training acceleration solutions proposed to increase client participation also fall short due to the dynamic nature of system resources. We address these challenges in this paper by designing FLOAT, a novel framework designed to boost FL client resource awareness. FLOAT optimizes resource utilization dynamically for meeting training deadlines, and mitigates stragglers and dropouts through various optimization techniques; leading to enhanced model convergence and improved performance. FLOAT leverages multi-objective Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF) to automate the selection of the optimization techniques and their configurations, tailoring them to individual client resource conditions. Moreover, FLOAT seamlessly integrates into existing FL systems, maintaining non-intrusiveness and versatility for both asynchronous and synchronous FL settings. As per our evaluations, FLOAT increases accuracy by up to 53%, reduces client dropouts by up to 78×, and improves communication, computation, and memory utilization by up to 81×, 44×, and 20× respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 已成为一种强大的方法，无需数据共享即可实现协作分布式模型训练。然而，FL 努力应对固有的异质性挑战，从而导致落后者、辍学和表现变化等问题。选择运行 FL 实例的客户端至关重要，但现有策略引入了偏见和参与问题，并且没有考虑资源效率。由于系统资源的动态特性，为提高客户参与度而提出的通信和培训加速解决方案也存在不足。我们在本文中通过设计 FLOAT 来解决这些挑战，这是一个旨在提高 FL 客户端资源意识的新颖框架。 FLOAT 动态优化资源利用率以满足训练期限，并通过各种优化技术减少落后者和辍学者；从而增强模型收敛性并提高性能。 FLOAT 利用带有人工反馈的多目标强化学习 (RLHF) 来自动选择优化技术及其配置，并根据各个客户的资源条件进行定制。此外，FLOAT 无缝集成到现有 FL 系统中，保持异步和同步 FL 设置的非侵入性和多功能性。根据我们的评估，FLOAT 将准确率提高了 53%，将客户端丢失率降低了 78 倍，并将通信、计算和内存利用率分别提高了 81 倍、44 倍和 20 倍。

items.title: Pronghorn: Effective Checkpoint Orchestration for Serverless Hot-Starts.
items.abstract: Serverless computing allows developers to deploy and scale stateless functions in ephemeral workers easily. As a result, serverless computing has been widely used for many applications, such as computer vision, video processing, and HTML generation. However, we find that the stateless nature of serverless computing wastes many of the important benefits modern language runtimes have to offer. A notable example is the extensive profiling and Just-in-Time (JIT) compilation effort that runtimes implement to achieve acceptable performance of popular high-level languages, such as Java, JavaScript, and Python. Unfortunately, when modern language runtimes are naively adopted in serverless computing, all of these efforts are lost upon worker eviction. Checkpoint-restore methods alleviate the problem by resuming workers from snapshots taken after initialization. However, production-grade language runtimes can take up to thousands of invocations to fully optimize a single function, thus rendering naive checkpoint-restore policies ineffective.
items.abstract_zh: 无服务器计算允许开发人员轻松地在临时工作人员中部署和扩展无状态功能。因此，无服务器计算已广泛应用于许多应用，例如计算机视觉、视频处理和 HTML 生成。然而，我们发现无服务器计算的无状态本质浪费了现代语言运行时必须提供的许多重要优势。一个值得注意的例子是运行时实现的广泛分析和即时 (JIT) 编译工作，以实现流行高级语言（例如 Java、JavaScript 和 Python）可接受的性能。不幸的是，当现代语言运行时被天真地采用在无服务器计算中时，所有这些努力都会因为工人被驱逐而消失。检查点恢复方法通过从初始化后拍摄的快照恢复工作人员来缓解该问题。然而，生产级语言运行时可能需要多达数千次调用才能完全优化单个函数，从而导致简单的检查点恢复策略无效。

items.title: CCL-BTree: A Crash-Consistent Locality-Aware B+-Tree for Reducing XPBuffer-Induced Write Amplification in Persistent Memory.
items.abstract: In persistent B+ -Tree, random updates of small key-value (KV) pairs will cause severe XPBuffer-induced write amplification (XBI-amplification) because CPU cacheline size is smaller than media access granularity in persistent memory (PM). We observe that XBI-amplification directly determines the application performance when the PM bandwidth is exhausted in multi-thread scenarios. However, none of the existing work can efficiently address the XBI-amplification issue while maintaining superior range query performance.
items.abstract_zh: 在持久 B+ -Tree 中，小键值 (KV) 对的随机更新将导致严重的 XPBuffer 引起的写放大 (XBI-amplification)，因为 CPU 缓存行大小小于持久内存 (PM) 中的介质访问粒度。我们观察到，XBI 放大直接决定了多线程场景下 PM 带宽耗尽时的应用程序性能。然而，现有的工作都无法在保持卓越的范围查询性能的同时有效解决 XBI 放大问题。

items.title: Astraea: Towards Fair and Efficient Learning-based Congestion Control.
items.abstract: Recent years have witnessed a plethora of learning-based solutions for congestion control (CC) that demonstrate better performance over traditional TCP schemes. However, they fail to provide consistently good convergence properties, including fairness, fast convergence and stability, due to the mismatch between their objective functions and these properties. Despite being intuitive, integrating these properties into existing learning-based CC is challenging, because: 1) their training environments are designed for the performance optimization of single flow but incapable of cooperative multi-flow optimization, and 2) there is no directly measurable metric to represent these properties into the training objective function.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来出现了大量基于学习的拥塞控制 (CC) 解决方案，这些解决方案比传统 TCP 方案表现出更好的性能。然而，由于目标函数与这些特性之间的不匹配，它们无法提供一致的良好收敛特性，包括公平性、快速收敛和稳定性。尽管很直观，但将这些属性集成到现有的基于学习的 CC 中是具有挑战性的，因为：1）它们的训练环境是为单流的性能优化而设计的，但无法进行协作多流优化；2）没有直接可测量的度量来将这些属性表示到训练目标函数中。

items.title: Halflife: An Adaptive Flowlet-based Load Balancer with Fading Timeout in Data Center Networks.
items.abstract: Modern data centers (DCs) employ various traffic load balancers to achieve high bisection bandwidth. Among them, flowlet switching has shown remarkable performance in both load balancing and upper-layer protocol (e.g., TCP) friendliness. However, flowlet-based load balancers suffer from the inflexibility of flowlet timeout value (FTV) and result in sub-optimal performance under various application workloads. To this end, we propose Halflife, a novel flowlet-based load balancer that leverages fading FTVs to reroute traffic promptly under different workloads without any prior knowledge. Halflife not only balances traffic better, but also avoids the performance degradation caused by frequent oscillation or shifting of lows between paths. Furthermore, Halflife's fading mechanism is not only compatible with most flowlet-based load balancers, such as CONGA and LetFlow, but also improves their performance when leveraging flowlet switching in RDMA network. Through testbed experiments and simulations, we prove that Halflife improves the performance of CONGA and LetFlow by 10% ~ 150%, and it outperforms other load balancers by 30% ~ 200% across most application workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 现代数据中心 (DC) 采用各种流量负载平衡器来实现高平分带宽。其中，Flowlet交换在负载均衡和上层协议（例如TCP）友好性方面都表现出了出色的性能。然而，基于 Flowlet 的负载均衡器受到 Flowlet 超时值 (FTV) 不灵活性的影响，并导致在各种应用程序工作负载下性能不佳。为此，我们提出了 Halflife，这是一种基于 Flowlet 的新型负载均衡器，它利用衰落 FTV 在不同工作负载下迅速重新路由流量，而无需任何先验知识。 Halflife不仅可以更好地平衡流量，还可以避免路径之间频繁振荡或低点移动导致的性能下降。此外，Halflife 的衰落机制不仅与大多数基于 Flowlet 的负载均衡器（例如 CONGA 和 LetFlow）兼容，而且还提高了它们在 RDMA 网络中利用 Flowlet 交换时的性能。通过测试床实验和模拟，我们证明Halflife将CONGA和LetFlow的性能提高了10% ~ 150%，并且在大多数应用程序工作负载上比其他负载均衡器性能高出30% ~ 200%。

items.title: Improving Resource and Energy Efficiency for Cloud 3D through Excessive Rendering Reduction.
items.abstract: The rise of cloud gaming makes interactive 3D applications an emerging type of data center workload. However, the excessive rendering in current cloud 3D systems leads to large gaps between the cloud and client frame rates (FPS, frames per second), thus wasting resources and power. Although FPS regulation can remove excessive rendering, due to the highly-varying frame processing time and the use of rendering delays, existing cloud FPS regulation solutions have low FPS and slow motion-to-photon (MtP) latency, causing violations of Quality-of-Service (QoS) requirements.
items.abstract_zh: 云游戏的兴起使得交互式 3D 应用程序成为一种新兴的数据中心工作负载类型。然而，当前云3D系统中的过度渲染导致云端和客户端帧速率（FPS，每秒帧数）之间存在较大差距，从而浪费资源和电力。虽然 FPS 调节可以消除过度渲染，但由于帧处理时间变化很大以及渲染延迟的使用，现有的云 FPS 调节解决方案具有低 FPS 和慢运动到光子 (MtP) 延迟，导致违反服务质量 (QoS) 要求。

items.title: Aceso: Efficient Parallel DNN Training through Iterative Bottleneck Alleviation.
items.abstract: Many parallel mechanisms, including data parallelism, tensor parallelism, and pipeline parallelism, have been proposed and combined together to support training increasingly large deep neural networks (DNN) on massive GPU devices. Given a DNN model and GPU cluster, finding the optimal configuration by combining these parallelism mechanisms is an NP-hard problem. Widely adopted mathematical programming approaches have been proposed to search in a configuration subspace, but they are still too costly when scaling to large models over numerous devices.
items.abstract_zh: 许多并行机制，包括数据并行、张量并行和管道并行，已经被提出并组合在一起，以支持在大规模 GPU 设备上训练越来越大的深度神经网络 (DNN)。给定 DNN 模型和 GPU 集群，通过组合这些并行机制找到最佳配置是一个 NP 困难问题。已经提出了广泛采用的数学编程方法来在配置子空间中进行搜索，但在扩展到众多设备上的大型模型时，它们的成本仍然太高。

items.title: Serialization/Deserialization-free State Transfer in Serverless Workflows.
items.abstract: Serialization and deserialization play a dominant role in the state transfer time of serverless workflows, leading to substantial performance penalties during workflow execution. We identify the key reason as a lack of ability to efficiently access the (remote) memory of another function. We propose RMMap, an OS primitive for remote memory map. It allows a serverless function to directly access the memory of another function, even if it is located remotely. RMMap is the first to completely eliminates serialization and deserialization when transferring states between any pairs of functions in (unmodified) serverless workflows. To make remote memory map efficient and feasible, we co-design it with fast networking (RDMA), OS, language runtime, and serverless platform. Evaluations using real-world serverless workloads show that integrating RMMap with Knative reduces the serverless workflow execution time on Knative by up to 2.6 × and improves resource utilizations by 86.3%.
items.abstract_zh: 序列化和反序列化在无服务器工作流的状态传输时间中起着主导作用，导致工作流执行期间的性能大幅下降。我们认为关键原因是缺乏有效访问另一个函数的（远程）内存的能力。我们提出 RMMap，一种用于远程内存映射的操作系统原语。它允许无服务器函数直接访问另一个函数的内存，即使它位于远程。 RMMap 是第一个在（未修改的）无服务器工作流程中的任何函数对之间传输状态时完全消除序列化和反序列化的。为了使远程内存映射高效且可行，我们将其与快速网络 (RDMA)、操作系统、语言运行时和无服务器平台共同设计。使用实际无服务器工作负载进行的评估表明，将 RMMap 与 Knative 集成可将 Knative 上的无服务器工作流执行时间缩短高达 2.6 倍，并将资源利用率提高 86.3%。

items.title: SplitFT: Fault Tolerance for Disaggregated Datacenters via Remote Memory Logging.
items.abstract: We introduce SplitFt, a new fault-tolerance approach for storage-centric applications in disaggregated data centers. SplitFt uses a novel split architecture, where large writes are directly performed on the underlying disaggregated storage system, while small writes are made fault-tolerant within the compute layer. The split architecture enables applications to achieve strong durability guarantees without compromising performance. SplitFt makes small writes fault-tolerant using a new abstraction called near-compute logs or Ncl, which leverages underutilized memory on remote nodes to log small writes in a fast, cheap, and transparent manner. We port three POSIX applications (RocksDB, Redis, and SQLite) to SplitFt and show that they offer strong guarantees compared to weak versions of the applications that can lose data; SplitFt applications do so while approximating weak versions' performance (only 0.1%-10% overhead under YCSB). Compared to strong versions, SplitFt improves performance significantly (2.5× to 27× under write-heavy workloads).
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 SplitFt，这是一种新的容错方法，适用于分类数据中心中以存储为中心的应用程序。 SplitFt采用了一种新颖的拆分架构，其中大写操作直接在底层分解存储系统上执行，而小写操作则在计算层内进行容错。分体式架构使应用程序能够在不影响性能的情况下获得强大的耐用性保证。 SplitFt 使用一种称为近计算日志或 Ncl 的新抽象使小写入具有容错能力，该抽象利用远程节点上未充分利用的内存以快速、廉价且透明的方式记录小写入。我们将三个 POSIX 应用程序（RocksDB、Redis 和 SQLite）移植到 SplitFt，并表明与可能丢失数据的弱版本应用程序相比，它们提供了强有力的保证； SplitFt 应用程序这样做的同时近似弱版本的性能（在 YCSB 下只有 0.1%-10% 的开销）。与强版本相比，SplitFt 显着提高了性能（在写入繁重的工作负载下提高了 2.5 倍到 27 倍）。

items.title: Noctua: Towards Automated and Practical Fine-grained Consistency Analysis.
items.abstract: Relaxing strong consistency plays a vital role in achieving scalability and availability for geo-replicated web applications. However, making relaxation correct in modern implementations, typically written in dynamic languages and utilizing high-level object-oriented database abstractions, remains a challenge, despite the existence of numerous proposed analysis tools.
items.abstract_zh: 放宽强一致性对于实现地理复制 Web 应用程序的可扩展性和可用性至关重要。然而，尽管存在许多建议的分析工具，但在通常用动态语言编写并利用高级面向对象数据库抽象的现代实现中使松弛正确仍然是一个挑战。

items.title: Puddles: Application-Independent Recovery and Location-Independent Data for Persistent Memory.
items.abstract: In this paper, we argue that current work has failed to provide a comprehensive and maintainable in-memory representation for persistent memory. PM data should be easily mappable into a process address space, shareable across processes, shippable between machines, consistent after a crash, and accessible to legacy code with fast, efficient pointers as first-class abstractions.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们认为当前的工作未能为持久内存提供全面且可维护的内存中表示。 PM 数据应该可以轻松映射到进程地址空间，可以跨进程共享，可以在机器之间传送，崩溃后保持一致，并且可以通过快速、高效的指针作为一流抽象来访问遗留代码。

items.title: Trinity: A Fast Compressed Multi-attribute Data Store.
items.abstract: With the proliferation of attribute-rich machine-generated data, emerging real-time monitoring, diagnosis, and visualization tools ingest and analyze such data across multiple attributes simultaneously. Due to the sheer volume of the data, applications need storage-efficient and performant data representations to analyze them efficiently.
items.abstract_zh: 随着属性丰富的机器生成数据的激增，新兴的实时监控、诊断和可视化工具可以同时摄取和分析多个属性的此类数据。由于数据量巨大，应用程序需要存储高效且高性能的数据表示形式才能有效地分析数据。

items.title: Model Selection for Latency-Critical Inference Serving.
items.abstract: In an inference service system, model selection and scheduling (MS&S) schemes map inference queries to trained machine learning (ML) models, hosted on a finite set of workers, to solicit accurate predictions within strict latency targets. MS&S is challenged by both varying query load and stochastic query inter-arrival patterns; however, state-of-the-art MS&S approaches conservatively account for load exclusively.
items.abstract_zh: 在推理服务系统中，模型选择和调度 (MS&S) 方案将推理查询映射到托管在有限工作人员集上的经过训练的机器学习 (ML) 模型，以在严格的延迟目标内请求准确的预测。 MS&S 面临着变化的查询负载和随机查询到达时间模式的挑战；然而，最先进的 MS&S 方法保守地仅考虑负载。

items.title: Enoki: High Velocity Linux Kernel Scheduler Development.
items.abstract: Kernel task scheduling is important for application performance, adaptability to new hardware, and complex user requirements. However, developing, testing, and debugging new scheduling algorithms in Linux, the most widely used cloud operating system, is slow and difficult. We developed Enoki, a framework for high velocity development of Linux kernel schedulers. Enoki schedulers are written in safe Rust, and the system supports live upgrade of new scheduling policies into the kernel, userspace debugging, and bidirectional communication with applications. A scheduler implemented with Enoki achieved near identical performance (within 1% on average) to the default Linux scheduler CFS on a wide range of benchmarks. Enoki is also able to support a range of research schedulers, specifically the Shinjuku scheduler, a locality aware scheduler, and the Arachne core arbiter, with good performance.
items.abstract_zh: 内核任务调度对于应用程序性能、对新硬件的适应性以及复杂的用户需求非常重要。然而，在使用最广泛的云操作系统Linux中开发、测试和调试新的调度算法既缓慢又困难。我们开发了 Enoki，一个用于高速开发 Linux 内核调度程序的框架。 Enoki 调度程序是用安全的 Rust 编写的，系统支持将新的调度策略实时升级到内核、用户空间调试以及与应用程序的双向通信。使用 Enoki 实现的调度程序在各种基准测试中实现了与默认 Linux 调度程序 CFS 几乎相同的性能（平均误差在 1% 以内）。 Enoki 还能够支持一系列研究调度程序，特别是 Shinjuku 调度程序、位置感知调度程序和 Arachne 核心仲裁程序，并且具有良好的性能。

items.title: Hoda: a High-performance Open vSwitch Dataplane with Multiple Specialized Data Paths.
items.abstract: Open vSwitch (OvS) has been widely used in cloud networks in view of its programmability and flexibility. However, we observe a huge performance drop when it loads practical cloud networking services (e.g., tunneling and firewalling). Our further analysis reveals that the root cause lies in the gap between the needs of supporting various selections of packet header fields and the one-size-fits-all data path in the vanilla OvS. Motivated by this, we design Hoda, a high-performance OvS dataplane with multiple specialized data paths. Specifically, Hoda constructs the specialized parser and microflow cache for each OpenFlow program so as to achieve lightweight parsing and caching. We also propose a configurable version of Hoda that introduces configuration knobs in the data path to ease specialization. The experiments with real-life OpenFlow rules show that Hoda achieves up to 1.7× speed up over the state-of-the-art OvS and 1.5× speed up over mSwitch. Hoda has also been deployed in a large cloud to serve various online services; the A/B test in the cloud reveals a 20% request process time reduction for Ngnix services.
items.abstract_zh: Open vSwitch（OvS）因其可编程性和灵活性而在云网络中得到了广泛的应用。然而，我们观察到当它加载实际的云网络服务（例如隧道和防火墙）时，性能会出现巨大下降。我们的进一步分析表明，根本原因在于支持各种数据包头字段选择的需求与普通 OvS 中通用的数据路径之间的差距。受此启发，我们设计了 Hoda，一种具有多个专用数据路径的高性能 OvS 数据平面。具体来说，Hoda为每个OpenFlow程序构建了专门的解析器和微流缓存，以实现轻量级的解析和缓存。我们还提出了 Hoda 的可配置版本，它在数据路径中引入了配置旋钮以简化专业化。使用现实 OpenFlow 规则进行的实验表明，Hoda 的速度比最先进的 OvS 提高了 1.7 倍，比 mSwitch 提高了 1.5 倍。 Hoda也被部署在大型云中，以服务各种在线服务；云中的 A/B 测试显示 Ngnix 服务的请求处理时间减少了 20%。

items.title: ScaleCache: A Scalable Page Cache for Multiple Solid-State Drives.
items.abstract: This paper presents a scalable page cache called ScaleCache for improving SSD scalability. Specifically, we first propose a concurrent data structure of page cache based on XArray (ccXArray) to enable access and update the page cache concurrently. Second, we introduce a direct page flush (dflush) which directly flushes pages to storage devices in a parallel and opportunistic manner. We implement ScaleCache with two techniques in the Linux kernel and evaluate it on a 64-core machine with eight NVMe SSDs. Our evaluations show that ScaleCache improves the performance of Linux file systems by up to 6.81× and 4.50× compared with the existing scheme and scalable scheme for multiple SSDs, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种称为 ScaleCache 的可扩展页面缓存，用于提高 SSD 可扩展性。具体来说，我们首先提出了一种基于XArray（ccXArray）的页缓存并发数据结构，以实现同时访问和更新页缓存。其次，我们引入直接页面刷新（dflush），它以并行和机会主义的方式直接将页面刷新到存储设备。我们在 Linux 内核中使用两种技术实现 ScaleCache，并在具有 8 个 NVMe SSD 的 64 核机器上对其进行评估。我们的评估表明，与现有方案和多SSD可扩展方案相比，ScaleCache分别将Linux文件系统的性能提高了6.81倍和4.50倍。

items.title: LSGraph: A Locality-centric High-performance Streaming Graph Engine.
items.abstract: Streaming graph has been broadly employed across various application domains. It involves updating edges to the graph and then performing analytics on the updated graph. However, existing solutions either suffer from poor data locality and high computation complexity for streaming graph analytics, or need high overhead to search and move graph data to ensure ordered neighbors during streaming graph update.
items.abstract_zh: 流图已广泛应用于各个应用领域。它涉及更新图的边，然后对更新后的图执行分析。然而，现有的解决方案要么面临流图分析的数据局部性差和计算复杂性高的问题，要么需要高开销来搜索和移动图数据以确保流图更新期间的有序邻居。

items.title: Erlang: Application-Aware Autoscaling for Cloud Microservices.
items.abstract: As cloud applications shift from monoliths to loosely coupled microservices, application developers must decide how many compute resources (e.g., number of replicated containers) to assign to each microservice within an application. This decision affects both (1) the dollar cost to the application developer and (2) the end-to-end latency perceived by the application user. Today, individual microservices are autoscaled independently by adding VMs whenever per-microservice CPU or memory utilization crosses a configurable threshold. However, an application user's end-to-end latency consists of time spent on multiple microservices and each microservice might need a different number of VMs to achieve an overall end-to-end latency.
items.abstract_zh: 随着云应用程序从整体转向松散耦合的微服务，应用程序开发人员必须决定分配给应用程序中的每个微服务的计算资源（例如，复制容器的数量）。此决定会影响 (1) 应用程序开发人员的美元成本和 (2) 应用程序用户感知的端到端延迟。如今，只要每个微服务的 CPU 或内存利用率超过可配置的阈值，单个微服务就会通过添加虚拟机来独立自动缩放。然而，应用程序用户的端到端延迟由在多个微服务上花费的时间组成，并且每个微服务可能需要不同数量的虚拟机才能实现总体端到端延迟。

items.title: NeuroFlux: Memory-Efficient CNN Training Using Adaptive Local Learning.
items.abstract: Efficient on-device Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) training in resource-constrained mobile and edge environments is an open challenge. Backpropagation is the standard approach adopted, but it is GPU memory intensive due to its strong inter-layer dependencies that demand intermediate activations across the entire CNN model to be retained in GPU memory. This necessitates smaller batch sizes to make training possible within the available GPU memory budget, but in turn, results in substantially high and impractical training time. We introduce NeuroFlux, a novel CNN training system tailored for memory-constrained scenarios. We develop two novel opportunities: firstly, adaptive auxiliary networks that employ a variable number of filters to reduce GPU memory usage, and secondly, block-specific adaptive batch sizes, which not only cater to the GPU memory constraints but also accelerate the training process. NeuroFlux segments a CNN into blocks based on GPU memory usage and further attaches an auxiliary network to each layer in these blocks. This disrupts the typical layer dependencies under a new training paradigm - 'adaptive local learning'. Moreover, NeuroFlux adeptly caches intermediate activations, eliminating redundant forward passes over previously trained blocks, further accelerating the training process. The results are twofold when compared to Backpropagation: on various hardware platforms, NeuroFlux demonstrates training speed-ups of 2.3× to 6.1× under stringent GPU memory budgets, and NeuroFlux generates streamlined models that have 10.9× to 29.4× fewer parameters.
items.abstract_zh: 在资源受限的移动和边缘环境中进行高效的设备端卷积神经网络 (CNN) 训练是一项公开的挑战。反向传播是采用的标准方法，但由于其强大的层间依赖性，需要将整个 CNN 模型的中间激活保留在 GPU 内存中，因此它是 GPU 内存密集型方法。这需要较小的批量大小才能在可用的 GPU 内存预算内进行训练，但反过来又会导致训练时间过长且不切实际。我们推出 NeuroFlux，这是一种专为内存受限场景量身定制的新型 CNN 训练系统。我们开发了两个新的机会：首先，自适应辅助网络采用可变数量的滤波器来减少 GPU 内存使用，其次是特定于块的自适应批量大小，它不仅可以满足 GPU 内存限制，还可以加速训练过程。 NeuroFlux 根据 GPU 内存使用情况将 CNN 分割成块，并进一步将辅助网络附加到这些块中的每一层。这破坏了新训练范式“自适应本地学习”下的典型层依赖性。此外，NeuroFlux 巧妙地缓存中间激活，消除了先前训练块上的冗余前向传递，进一步加速了训练过程。与反向传播相比，结果是双重的：在各种硬件平台上，NeuroFlux 在严格的 GPU 内存预算下展示了 2.3 倍到 6.1 倍的训练速度，并且 NeuroFlux 生成的简化模型的参数减少了 10.9 倍到 29.4 倍。

items.title: TraceUpscaler: Upscaling Traces to Evaluate Systems at High Load.
items.abstract: Trace replay is a common approach for evaluating systems by rerunning historical traffic patterns, but it is not always possible to find suitable real-world traces at the desired level of system load. Experimenting with higher traffic loads requires upscaling a trace to artificially increase the load. Unfortunately, most prior research has adopted ad-hoc approaches for upscaling, and there has not been a systematic study of how the upscaling approach impacts the results. One common approach is to count the arrivals in a predefined time-interval and multiply these counts by a factor, but this requires generating new requests/jobs according to some model (e.g., a Poisson process), which may not be realistic. Another common approach is to divide all the timestamps in the trace by an upscaling factor to squeeze the requests into a shorter time period. However, this can distort temporal patterns within the input trace. This paper evaluates the pros and cons of existing trace upscaling techniques and introduces a new approach, TraceUpscaler, that avoids the drawbacks of existing methods. The key idea behind TraceUpscaler is to decouple the arrival timestamps from the request parameters/data and upscale just the arrival timestamps in a way that preserves temporal patterns within the input trace. Our work applies to open-loop traffic where requests have arrival timestamps that aren't dependent on previous request completions. We evaluate TraceUpscaler under multiple experimental settings using both real-world and synthetic traces. Through our study, we identify the trace characteristics that affect the quality of upscaling in existing approaches and show how TraceUpscaler avoids these pitfalls. We also present a case study demonstrating how inaccurate trace upscaling can lead to incorrect conclusions about a system's ability to handle high load.
items.abstract_zh: 跟踪重放是通过重新运行历史流量模式来评估系统的常用方法，但并不总是能够在所需的系统负载级别找到合适的现实世界跟踪。尝试更高的流量负载需要放大跟踪以人为地增加负载。不幸的是，大多数先前的研究都采用了临时的升级方法，并且还没有对升级方法如何影响结果进行系统的研究。一种常见的方法是对预定义时间间隔内的到达进行计数，并将这些计数乘以一个因子，但这需要根据某种模型（例如泊松过程）生成新的请求/作业，这可能不现实。另一种常见的方法是将跟踪中的所有时间戳除以放大因子，以将请求压缩到更短的时间段内。然而，这可能会扭曲输入轨迹内的时间模式。本文评估了现有跟踪放大技术的优缺点，并介绍了一种新方法 TraceUpscaler，它避免了现有方法的缺点。 TraceUpscaler 背后的关键思想是将到达时间戳与请求参数/数据解耦，并以保留输入跟踪中的时间模式的方式仅升级到达时间戳。我们的工作适用于开环流量，其中请求的到达时间戳不依赖于先前请求的完成情况。我们使用真实世界和合成轨迹在多个实验设置下评估 TraceUpscaler。通过我们的研究，我们确定了现有方法中影响升级质量的跟踪特征，并展示了 TraceUpscaler 如何避免这些陷阱。我们还提供了一个案例研究，展示了不准确的跟踪升级如何导致有关系统处理高负载能力的错误结论。

items.title: ScheMoE: An Extensible Mixture-of-Experts Distributed Training System with Tasks Scheduling.
items.abstract: In recent years, large-scale models can be easily scaled to trillions of parameters with sparsely activated mixture-of-experts (MoE), which significantly improves the model quality while only requiring a sub-linear increase in computational costs. However, MoE layers require the input data to be dynamically routed to a particular GPU for computing during distributed training. The highly dynamic property of data routing and high communication costs in MoE make the training system low scaling efficiency on GPU clusters. In this work, we propose an extensible and efficient MoE training system, ScheMoE, which is equipped with several features. 1) ScheMoE provides a generic scheduling framework that allows the communication and computation tasks in training MoE models to be scheduled in an optimal way. 2) ScheMoE integrates our proposed novel all-to-all collective which better utilizes intra- and inter-connect bandwidths. 3) ScheMoE supports easy extensions of customized all-to-all collectives and data compression approaches while enjoying our scheduling algorithm. Extensive experiments are conducted on a 32-GPU cluster and the results show that ScheMoE outperforms existing state-of-the-art MoE systems, Tutel and Faster-MoE, by 9%-30%.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，通过稀疏激活的专家混合（MoE），大型模型可以轻松扩展到数万亿个参数，这显着提高了模型质量，同时只需要计算成本的次线性增加。然而，MoE 层需要将输入数据动态路由到特定 GPU 以在分布式训练期间进行计算。 MoE中数据路由的高度动态特性和高通信成本使得训练系统在GPU集群上的扩展效率较低。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种可扩展且高效的 MoE 培训系统 ScheMoE，它具有多种功能。 1）ScheMoE提供了一个通用的调度框架，允许以最佳方式调度训练MoE模型中的通信和计算任务。 2) ScheMoE 集成了我们提出的新型全对全集合，可以更好地利用内部和互连带宽。 3) ScheMoE 支持轻松扩展定制的全对全集合和数据压缩方法，同时享受我们的调度算法。在 32-GPU 集群上进行了大量实验，结果表明，ScheMoE 的性能优于现有最先进的 MoE 系统 Tutel 和 Faster-MoE 9%-30%。

items.title: Blaze: Holistic Caching for Iterative Data Processing.
items.abstract: Modern data processing workloads, such as machine learning and graph processing, involve iterative computations to converge generated models into higher accuracy. An effective caching mechanism is vital to expedite iterative computations since the intermediate data that needs to be stored in memory grows larger over iterations, often exceeding the memory capacity. However, existing systems handle intermediate data through separate operational layers (e.g., caching, eviction, and recovery), with each layer working independently in a greedy or cost-agnostic manner. These layers typically rely on user annotations and past access patterns, failing to make globally optimal decisions for the workload.
items.abstract_zh: 现代数据处理工作负载（例如机器学习和图形处理）涉及迭代计算，以将生成的模型收敛到更高的精度。有效的缓存机制对于加快迭代计算至关重要，因为需要存储在内存中的中间数据在迭代过程中会变得越来越大，通常会超出内存容量。然而，现有系统通过单独的操作层（例如缓存、驱逐和恢复）处理中间数据，每个层以贪婪或成本不可知的方式独立工作。这些层通常依赖于用户注释和过去的访问模式，无法针对工作负载做出全局最佳决策。

items.title: Orion: Interference-aware, Fine-grained GPU Sharing for ML Applications.
items.abstract: GPUs are critical for maximizing the throughput-per-Watt of deep neural network (DNN) applications. However, DNN applications often underutilize GPUs, even when using large batch sizes and eliminating input data processing or communication stalls. DNN workloads consist of data-dependent operators, with different compute and memory requirements. While an operator may saturate GPU compute units or memory bandwidth, it often leaves other GPU resources idle. Despite the prevalence of GPU sharing techniques, current approaches are not sufficiently fine-grained or interference-aware to maximize GPU utilization while minimizing interference at the granularity of 10s of μs. We propose Orion, a system that transparently intercepts GPU kernel launches from multiple clients sharing a GPU. Orion schedules work on the GPU at the granularity of individual operators and minimizes interference by taking into account each operator's compute and memory requirements. We integrate Orion in PyTorch and demonstrate its benefits in various DNN workload collocation use cases. Orion significantly improves tail latency compared to state-of-the-art baselines for a high-priority inference job while collocating best-effort inference jobs to increase per-GPU request throughput by up to 7.3×, or while collocating DNN training, saving up to 1.49× in training costs compared to dedicated GPU allocation.
items.abstract_zh: GPU 对于最大化深度神经网络 (DNN) 应用的每瓦吞吐量至关重要。然而，DNN 应用程序经常未充分利用 GPU，即使使用大批量大小并消除输入数据处理或通信停顿也是如此。 DNN 工作负载由依赖于数据的运算符组成，具有不同的计算和内存要求。虽然操作员可能会使 GPU 计算单元或内存带宽饱和，但它通常会使其他 GPU 资源闲置。尽管 GPU 共享技术很流行，但当前的方法还不够细粒度或干扰感知，无法最大限度地提高 GPU 利用率，同时最大限度地减少 10 μs 粒度的干扰。我们提出了 Orion，这是一个可以透明地拦截共享 GPU 的多个客户端的 GPU 内核启动的系统。 Orion 以各个算子的粒度来调度 GPU 上的工作，并通过考虑每个算子的计算和内存需求来最大限度地减少干扰。我们将 Orion 集成到 PyTorch 中，并在各种 DNN 工作负载搭配用例中展示其优势。与高优先级推理作业的最先进基线相比，Orion 显着改善了尾部延迟，同时搭配尽力而为的推理作业，将每个 GPU 请求吞吐量提高了 7.3 倍，或者在搭配 DNN 训练时，与专用 GPU 分配相比，节省了高达 1.49 倍的训练成本。

items.title: On the Limitations of Carbon-Aware Temporal and Spatial Workload Shifting in the Cloud.
items.abstract: Cloud platforms have been focusing on reducing their carbon emissions by shifting workloads across time and locations to when and where low-carbon energy is available. Despite the prominence of this idea, prior work has only quantified the potential of spatiotemporal workload shifting in narrow settings, i.e., for specific workloads in select regions. In particular, there has been limited work on quantifying an upper bound on the ideal and practical benefits of carbon-aware spatiotemporal workload shifting for a wide range of cloud workloads. To address the problem, we conduct a detailed data-driven analysis to understand the benefits and limitations of carbon-aware spatiotemporal scheduling for cloud workloads. We utilize carbon intensity data from 123 regions, encompassing most major cloud sites, to analyze two broad classes of workloads---batch and interactive---and their various characteristics, e.g., job duration, deadlines, and SLOs. Our findings show that while spatiotemporal workload shifting can reduce workloads' carbon emissions, the practical upper bounds of these carbon reductions are currently limited and far from ideal. We also show that simple scheduling policies often yield most of these reductions, with more sophisticated techniques yielding little additional benefit. Notably, we also find that the benefit of carbon-aware workload scheduling relative to carbon-agnostic scheduling will decrease as the energy supply becomes "greener."
items.abstract_zh: 云平台一直致力于通过将工作负载跨时间和地点转移到低碳能源可用的时间和地点来减少碳排放。尽管这个想法很突出，但之前的工作仅量化了狭窄环境中时空工作负载转移的潜力，即针对选定区域的特定工作负载。特别是，在量化各种云工作负载的碳感知时空工作负载转移的理想和实际效益上限方面，所做的工作非常有限。为了解决这个问题，我们进行了详细的数据驱动分析，以了解云工作负载的碳感知时空调度的优点和局限性。我们利用来自 123 个地区（涵盖大多数主要云站点）的碳强度数据来分析两大类工作负载（批量工作负载和交互式工作负载）及其各种特征，例如作业持续时间、截止日期和 SLO。我们的研究结果表明，虽然时空工作负载转移可以减少工作负载的碳排放，但这些碳减排的实际上限目前是有限的，而且远非理想。我们还表明，简单的调度策略通常会产生大部分的减少，而更复杂的技术几乎不会带来额外的好处。值得注意的是，我们还发现，随着能源供应变得“更加绿色”，碳感知工作负载调度相对于碳不可知调度的好处将会减少。

items.title: TTLs Matter: Efficient Cache Sizing with TTL-Aware Miss Ratio Curves and Working Set Sizes.
items.abstract: In-memory caches play a pivotal role in optimizing distributed systems by significantly reducing query response times. Correctly sizing these caches is critical, especially considering that prominent organizations use terabytes and even petabytes of DRAM for these caches. The Miss Ratio Curve (MRC) and Working Set Size (WSS) are the most widely used tools for sizing these caches.
items.abstract_zh: 内存缓存通过显着减少查询响应时间，在优化分布式系统方面发挥着关键作用。正确调整这些缓存的大小至关重要，特别是考虑到知名组织为这些缓存使用 TB 甚至 PB 的 DRAM。未命中率曲线 (MRC) 和工作集大小 (WSS) 是最广泛使用的用于调整这些缓存大小的工具。

items.title: Finding Correctness Bugs in eBPF Verifier with Structured and Sanitized Program.
items.abstract: eBPF is an inspiring technique in Linux that allows user space processes to extend the kernel by dynamically injecting programs. However, it poses security issues, since the untrusted user code is now executed in the kernel space. eBPF utilizes a verifier to validate the safety of the provided programs, thus its correctness is of paramount importance as attackers may exploit vulnerabilities within it to inject malicious programs. Bug-finding tools like kernel fuzzers currently can detect memory bugs in eBPF system calls, but they experience difficulties in finding correctness bugs in the verifier, e.g., incorrect validations that allow the loading of unsafe programs. Because, unlike detecting memory bugs, where sanitizers can capture such errors once observed, automatically uncovering correctness bugs is very difficult, without an effective test oracle that determines if the verifier behaves correctly for given programs.
items.abstract_zh: eBPF 是 Linux 中一项鼓舞人心的技术，它允许用户空间进程通过动态注入程序来扩展内核。然而，它会带来安全问题，因为不受信任的用户代码现在是在内核空间中执行的。 eBPF利用验证器来验证所提供程序的安全性，因此其正确性至关重要，因为攻击者可能会利用其中的漏洞注入恶意程序。像内核模糊器这样的错误查找工具目前可以检测 eBPF 系统调用中的内存错误，但它们在查找验证器中的正确性错误时遇到困难，例如允许加载不安全程序的错误验证。因为，与检测内存错误不同，清理程序可以在观察到此类错误后捕获此类错误，而如果没有有效的测试预言机来确定验证程序对于给定程序的行为是否正确，自动发现正确性错误是非常困难的。

items.title: SandTable: Scalable Distributed System Model Checking with Specification-Level State Exploration.
items.abstract: Implementation-level distributed system model checkers (DMCKs) have proven valuable in verifying the correctness of real distributed systems. However, they primarily focus on state space reduction, and often have a bottleneck on another crucial dimension: exploration speed. To scale DMCK, we introduce SandTable, a technique for lifting state-space exploration from the implementation level to the specification level, and confirming bugs at the implementation level. We made SandTable practical through a methodology consisting of four essential parts: (1) writing specifications that adhere to the implementation, (2) checking conformance to enhance specification quality and reduce false positives and false negatives, (3) exploring the state space with heuristics for effectiveness and efficiency, and (4) confirming bugs and verifying their fixes in the implementation.
items.abstract_zh: 事实证明，实现级分布式系统模型检查器 (DMCK) 在验证真实分布式系统的正确性方面很有价值。然而，它们主要关注状态空间缩减，并且常常在另一个关键维度上遇到瓶颈：探索速度。为了扩展 DMCK，我们引入了 SandTable，这是一种将状态空间探索从实现级别提升到规范级别并在实现级别确认错误的技术。我们通过由四个基本部分组成的方法使 SandTable 变得实用：(1) 编写符合实现的规范，(2) 检查一致性以提高规范质量并减少误报和漏报，(3) 通过启发式方法探索状态空间以提高有效性和效率，(4) 确认错误并验证实现中的修复。

items.title: Exploring Performance and Cost Optimization with ASIC-Based CXL Memory.
items.abstract: As memory-intensive applications continue to drive the need for advanced architectural solutions, Compute Express Link (CXL) has risen as a promising interconnect technology that enables seamless high-speed, low-latency communication between host processors and various peripheral devices. In this study, we explore the application performance of ASIC CXL memory in various data-center scenarios. We then further explore multiple potential impacts (e.g., throughput, latency, and cost reduction) of employing CXL memory via carefully designed policies and strategies. Our empirical results show the high potential of CXL memory, reveal multiple intriguing observations of CXL memory and contribute to the wide adoption of CXL memory in real-world deployment environments. Based on our benchmarks, we also develop an Abstract Cost Model that can estimate the cost benefit from using CXL memory.
items.abstract_zh: 随着内存密集型应用不断推动对高级架构解决方案的需求，Compute Express Link (CXL) 已成为一种有前途的互连技术，可实现主机处理器和各种外围设备之间的无缝高速、低延迟通信。在本研究中，我们探讨了 ASIC CXL 内存在各种数据中心场景中的应用性能。然后，我们通过精心设计的策略和策略进一步探索使用 CXL 内存的多种潜在影响（例如吞吐量、延迟和成本降低）。我们的实证结果显示了 CXL 内存的巨大潜力，揭示了 CXL 内存的多个有趣的观察结果，并有助于 CXL 内存在实际部署环境中的广泛采用。根据我们的基准，我们还开发了一个抽象成本模型，可以估计使用 CXL 内存的成本效益。

items.title: Efficient Auditing of Event-driven Web Applications.
items.abstract: When a deployer of a web application puts that application on a server (on-prem or cloud), how can they be sure that the application is executing as intended? This paper studies how the deployer can efficiently check that the execution is faithful. We seek mechanisms that: (i) work with web applications that are built with modern event-driven web frameworks, (ii) impose tolerable computation and communication overheads on the web server, and (iii) are complete and sound. We exhibit such a mechanism, based on a new record-replay algorithm. We have implemented our algorithm in Karousos, a system that audits Node.js web applications.
items.abstract_zh: 当 Web 应用程序的部署者将该应用程序放置在服务器（本地或云）上时，他们如何确保应用程序按预期执行？本文研究部署者如何有效地检查执行是否忠实。我们寻求的机制：(i) 使用使用现代事件驱动的 Web 框架构建的 Web 应用程序，(ii) 在 Web 服务器上施加可容忍的计算和通信开销，以及 (iii) 完整且健全。我们展示了这样一种基于新的记录重放算法的机制。我们已经在 Karousos 中实现了我们的算法，Karousos 是一个审核 Node.js Web 应用程序的系统。

items.title: Draconis: Network-Accelerated Scheduling for Microsecond-Scale Workloads.
items.abstract: We present Draconis, a novel scheduler for workloads in the range of tens to hundreds of microseconds. Draconis challenges the popular belief that programmable switches cannot house the complex data structures, such as queues, needed to support an in-network scheduler. Using programmable switches, Draconis achieves the low scheduling tail latency and high throughput needed to support these microsecond-scale workloads on large clusters. Furthermore, Draconis supports a wide range of complex scheduling policies, including locality-aware scheduling, priority-based scheduling, and resource-based scheduling.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 Draconis，这是一种新颖的调度程序，适用于数十到数百微秒的工作负载。 Draconis 挑战了人们普遍认为可编程交换机无法容纳支持网络内调度程序所需的复杂数据结构（例如队列）的观点。使用可编程交换机，Draconis 实现了支持大型集群上这些微秒级工作负载所需的低调度尾延迟和高吞吐量。此外，Draconis 支持各种复杂的调度策略，包括位置感知调度、基于优先级的调度和基于资源的调度。

items.title: Wormhole Filters: Caching Your Hash on Persistent Memory.
items.abstract: Approximate membership query (AMQ) data structures can approximately determine whether an element is in the set with high efficiency. They are widely used in distributed systems, database systems, bioinformatics, IoT applications, data stream mining, etc. However, the memory consumption of AMQ data structures grows rapidly as the data scale grows, which limits the system's ability to process a massive amount of data. The emerging persistent memory provides a close-to-DRAM access speed and terabyte-level capacity, facilitating AMQ data structures to handle massive data. Nevertheless, existing AMQ data structures perform poorly on persistent memory due to intensive random accesses and/or sequential writes. Therefore, we propose a novel AMQ data structure called wormhole filter, which achieves high performance on persistent memory by reducing random accesses and sequential writes. In addition, we reduce the number of log records for lower recovery overhead. Theoretical analysis and experimental results show that wormhole filters significantly outperform competitive state-of-the-art AMQ data structures. For example, wormhole filters achieve 23.26× insertion throughput, 1.98× positive lookup throughput, and 8.82× deletion throughput of the best competing baseline.
items.abstract_zh: 近似成员资格查询（AMQ）数据结构可以高效地近似判断某个元素是否在集合中。它们广泛应用于分布式系统、数据库系统、生物信息学、物联网应用、数据流挖掘等。然而，AMQ数据结构的内存消耗随着数据规模的增长而快速增长，限制了系统处理海量数据的能力。新兴的持久内存提供了接近DRAM的访问速度和TB级容量，有利于AMQ数据结构处理海量数据。然而，由于密集的随机访问和/或顺序写入，现有的 AMQ 数据结构在持久内存上表现不佳。因此，我们提出了一种称为虫洞过滤器的新型 AMQ 数据结构，它通过减少随机访问和顺序写入来实现持久内存的高性能。此外，我们还减少了日志记录的数量以降低恢复开销。理论分析和实验结果表明，虫洞过滤器的性能显着优于最先进的 AMQ 数据结构。例如，虫洞过滤器实现了最佳竞争基线的 23.26× 插入吞吐量、1.98× 正查找吞吐量和 8.82× 删除吞吐量。

items.title: Bandle: Asynchronous State Machine Replication Made Efficient.
items.abstract: State machine replication (SMR) uses consensus as its core component for reaching agreement among a group of processes, in order to provide fault-tolerant services. Most SMR protocols, such as Paxos and Raft, are designed in the partial synchrony model. Partially synchronous protocols rely on timing assumptions to elect a special role (such as the leader), which may become the performance bottleneck under a heavy workload. From an engineering perspective, partially synchronous protocols have to wait for a pre-defined period of time and implement a (complicated) failover mechanism in order to replace the faulty leader. In contrast, asynchronous protocols are immune to such problems.
items.abstract_zh: 状态机复制（SMR）使用共识作为其核心组件，用于在一组进程之间达成一致，以提供容错服务。大多数SMR协议，例如Paxos和Raft，都是在部分同步模型中设计的。部分同步协议依赖于时序假设来选举特殊角色（例如领导者），这可能会成为繁重工作负载下的性能瓶颈。从工程角度来看，部分同步协议必须等待预定义的时间段并实现（复杂的）故障转移机制才能替换出现故障的领导者。相比之下，异步协议则不受此类问题的影响。

items.title: Snatch: Online Streaming Analytics at the Network Edge.
items.abstract: In recent years, we have witnessed a growing trend of content hyper-giants deploying server infrastructure and services close to end-users, in "eyeball" networks. Still, one of the services that remained largely unaffected by this trend is online streaming analytics. This is despite the fact that most of the "big data" is received in real time and is most valuable at the time of arrival. The inability to process requests at the network edge is caused by a common setting where user profiles, necessary for analytics, are stored deep in the data center back-ends. This setting also carries privacy concerns as such user profiles are individually identifiable, yet the users are almost blind to what data is associated with their identities and how the data is analyzed. In this paper, we revise this arrangement, and plant encrypted semantic cookies at the user end. Without altering any of the existing protocols, this enables capturing and analytically pre-processing user requests soon after they are generated, at edge ISPs or content providers' off-nets. In addition, it ensures user anonymity perseverance during the analytics. We design and implement Snatch, a QUIC-based streaming analytics prototype, and demonstrate that it speeds up user analytics by up to 200x, and by 10-30x in the common case.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，我们目睹了内容超级巨头在“眼球”网络中靠近最终用户部署服务器基础设施和服务的日益增长的趋势。尽管如此，在线流媒体分析仍然是基本上不受这一趋势影响的服务之一。尽管事实上大多数“大数据”都是实时接收的，并且在到达时才最有价值。无法在网络边缘处理请求是由一种常见设置引起的，其中分析所需的用户配置文件存储在数据中心后端深处。这种设置还存在隐私问题，因为此类用户配置文件是可单独识别的，但用户几乎不知道哪些数据与其身份相关联以及如何分析数据。在本文中，我们修改了这种安排，并在用户端植入加密的语义cookie。在不改变任何现有协议的情况下，这可以在用户请求生成后立即在边缘 ISP 或内容提供商的网外捕获并分析预处理用户请求。此外，它还确保用户在分析过程中坚持匿名。我们设计并实现了基于 QUIC 的流分析原型 Snatch，并证明它可以将用户分析速度提高 200 倍，在常见情况下提高 10-30 倍。

items.title: Occam: A Programming System for Reliable Network Management.
items.abstract: The complexity of large networks makes their management a daunting task. State-of-the-art network management tools use workflow systems for automation, but they do not adequately address the substantial challenges in operation reliability.
